headline: Church & Dwight Analysts Boost Their Forecasts Following Upbeat Q1 Results
summary: Church & Dwight Co., Inc (NYSE:CHD) reported strong Q1 2026 results, beating estimates. Maintains full-year guidance despite macro pressures.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Church & Dwight Co, Raises Price Target to $114

headline: CHD Q1 Deep Dive: Organic Growth and Distribution Gains Offset Flat Top-Line
summary: Household products company Church & Dwight (NYSE:CHD) reported Q1 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, but sales were flat year on year at $1.47 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.95 per share was 2.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Church & Dwight (CHD) Q1 Beat, Margin Gains And Affirmed Dividend
summary: In the first quarter of 2026, Church & Dwight Co., Inc. reported sales of US$1,469.3 million and net income of US$216.3 million, while also affirming a quarterly dividend of US$0.3075 per share payable on June 1, 2026. The company’s modest reported sales growth masked 5% organic growth and a 130 basis point improvement in adjusted gross margin, reflecting strong volume gains, new product launches, and expanded distribution across key brands even as it prepares for a 1% reported sales decline...
